name: Goo Go
short_description: Test your skills, patience, and nerves in a game where one mistake will send you back to the beginning. Oh, and welcome to "Goo Go"!
detailed_description:
Welcome to "Goo Go"!

Control Goo using a triple jump and movement keys to overcome obstacles and climb higher and higher. It’s a game that will test your skills, patience, and, of course, the strength of your nerves.

Game Features:

  • Difficult but not impossible gameplay. Perseverance and practice will help you reach the top.

  • Every obstacle is designed with intent and requires precision.

  • Focused gameplay without distracting elements.

  • You are immortal! But every mistake or excessive rush will send you back to the very start.

  • Jump, slide, fall, and start again. And again, and again.

  • A test of endurance and patience.

Note from the developer:

This game was created by one person at the peak of motivation and its rapid fading due to emotional burnout. I was inspired by "Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy," "A Difficult Game About Climbing," and the first version of "Only Up!" These games are an homage to the older "Sexy Hiking" by Jazzuo. I have mixed feelings about such games: I hate and love them at the same time. They burn through your neurons, but at the same time, they make you cherish your achievements. I wanted to contribute to the "Foddian" genre and create something unusual, not just a clone.

I wish you luck and patience! My apologies if the game doesn't meet your expectations. To be honest, I didn't create a masterpiece; it’s far from it.
